Chose 'Equity attributable to parent company share holders' from the sheet preview because it more directly excludes non-controlling interests and is preferable to 'Total Equity' under the BE/MIB rule. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to parent company share holders
